stats.fact: Sonar API standard model is priced at $1 per million tokens (input and output); no extra per-query fee for live web search
Sonar Pro is priced at $3 per million input tokens and $15 per million output tokens with a 200K context window
Sonar-Reasoning-Pro scored 1136 in the Search Arena evaluation, statistically tied with Gemini-2.5-Pro-Grounding (1142) at top position
Sonar Pro cites 2-3x more sources per response than equivalent Gemini models
In production testing, Sonar models delivered inline citations on 94% of test queries with latency consistently under 2 seconds
Using Sonar reduced hallucination rate by approximately 60% compared to non-grounded LLMs in production apps
Copy.ai reported 8 hours of research saved per sales rep per week and a 20% increase in throughput after integrating Sonar
A 500-query/day customer support chatbot cost ~$120/month on Sonar vs ~$280/month on GPT-4 + Google Custom Search — a 57% cost reduction
search_domain_filter supports up to 20 domains or URLs per request, with allowlist or denylist mode
In 2026, citation tokens were removed from billing for Sonar and Sonar Pro — now only Deep Research incurs citation token costs
Sonar Pro Search (agentic multi-step mode) adds $14–$22 per 1,000 requests on top of token costs
OpenAI's search tool costs an estimated $20–$25 per 1,000 search-grounded requests vs Perplexity Sonar at $5–$14
